papers.title_en: Bayesian perturbation-driven consistency regularization for semi-supervised medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对半监督医学图像分割中一致性正则化（CR）过度依赖手工设计扰动的局限性，提出了一种贝叶斯扰动驱动的一致性正则化框架。该方法通过贝叶斯视角建模扰动，生成更具代表性和适应性的互补视图，从而在有限标注数据下显著提升了分割性能，为医学影像分析提供了一种更稳健的半监督学习方案。
papers.abstract_en: Consistency Regularization (CR) is a core paradigm in semi-supervised learning,whose effectiveness hinges on the perturbations used to construct complementaryviews. Existing CR methods typically rely on handcrafted “prior” perturbations …

papers.title_en: A Digital Twin Framework for Modeling Multi-Organ Radiomics Stability in Total-Body PET Imaging
papers.tldr: 本研究针对全身PET成像中影像组学特征易受数据采集变异性影响、导致定量模型和数字孪生应用可靠性受限的问题，提出了一种数字孪生框架。该框架旨在建模多器官影像组学的稳定性，通过模拟不同采集条件下的特征变化，为提高全身PET定量分析的稳健性提供了新方法，对精准医疗中的数字孪生构建具有重要意义。
papers.abstract_en: Rationale and Objectives Radiomics features derived from total-body PET imagingare sensitive to data acquisition variability, thereby limiting their reliability forquantitative modeling and digital twin applications. This study aimed to model multi …

papers.title_en: MIMIC-IV-Ext-PE: Pulmonary Embolism Labels for CT Pulmonary Angiography Radiology Reports}}
papers.tldr: 本研究发布了MIMIC-IV-Ext-PE数据集，为MIMIC-IV数据库中的CT肺血管造影（CTPA）放射报告提供了肺栓塞（PE）相关的结构化标签。肺栓塞是导致住院死亡的主要原因，该数据集通过提供大规模公开的标注数据，旨在推动PE的自动诊断、风险分层及预防研究，填补了领域内高质量公共资源的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Pulmonary embolism (PE) is a leading cause of preventable in-hospital mortality.Advances in diagnosis, risk stratification, and prevention can improve outcomes.Large, publicly available datasets are needed to move research forward but are …

papers.title_en: How Auditory Knowledge in LLM Backbones Shapes Audio Language Models: A Holistic Evaluation
papers.tldr: 本研究深入探讨了仅经过文本预训练的大语言模型（LLM）中蕴含的听觉知识，及其对大型音频语言模型（LALM）性能的影响。通过对多种LLM骨干网络在音频任务中的表现进行全面评估，揭示了文本预训练阶段积累的听觉概念如何转化为实际的音频理解能力，为优化LALM的设计提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely used as knowledge backbones ofLarge Audio Language Models (LALMs), yet how much auditory knowledge theyencode through text-only pre-training and how this affects downstream performance …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对深度神经语言模型中语言表示定位与分析的长期难题，提出了一种名为 Perturbation 的简单且高效的对抗性追踪器。该方法通过引入对抗性扰动机制，旨在更有效地识别和分析模型内部的语言表示特征。相比传统探测方法，它在保持计算效率的同时，为理解语言模型的内部工作机制提供了新的视角，是表示学习领域的一项重要工具贡献。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
papers.tldr: 本文针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在视觉指令微调过程中出现的“推理税”问题，即感知能力提升伴随推理能力下降的现象，提出了一种输入自适应深度聚合（IADA）方法。该方法通过动态调整模型深度来优化特征处理，旨在增强模型视觉感知能力的同时，最大限度地保留其原有的逻辑推理性能，为解决VLM微调中的能力失衡提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptualcapabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoningperformance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Predict Future-Aligned Research Proposals with Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在科研构思中难以评估的问题，提出了一种预测“未来对齐”研究提案的方法。由于自动衡量科研想法的创新性和合理性存在挑战，且大规模人工评估成本高昂，该研究通过让模型预测与未来实际科研进展相符的提案，为评估LLM生成的科研想法提供了新视角，旨在提升AI辅助科研的质量与前瞻性。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist ideation in research,but evaluating the quality of LLM-generated research proposals remains difficult:novelty and soundness are hard to measure automatically, and large-scale human …

papers.title_en: TP-Seg: Task-Prototype Framework for Unified Medical Lesion Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究提出TP-Seg框架，旨在通过单一参数集实现多种医疗病灶的统一分割。针对现有统一模型在处理多样化病灶时的局限性，该框架引入了任务原型机制，有效平衡了任务间的共性与特性，在保持参数高效的同时提升了多任务医疗影像分割的准确性，为AI辅助诊断提供了更通用的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Building a unified model with a single set of parameters to efficiently handle diversetypes of medical lesion segmentation has become a crucial objective for AI-assisteddiagnosis. Existing unified segmentation approaches typically rely on shared …

papers.title_en: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散多模态大语言模型（dLLMs）在视觉定位推理中的不足，提出了“Thinking Diffusion”框架。该方法通过在扩散去噪过程中引入惩罚与引导机制，优化了模型对视觉信息的理解与逻辑推理能力。作为自回归模型的有力替代，该研究显著提升了扩散模型在复杂多模态任务中的准确性与可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives toautoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodaltasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models …

papers.title_en: Gaze2Report: Radiology Report Generation via Visual-Gaze Prompt Tuning of LLMs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科报告生成中忽视医生医学先验知识的问题，提出了Gaze2Report框架。该方法通过将医生的视觉注视轨迹作为视觉提示，对大语言模型进行提示微调，实现了图像特征与医学逻辑的深度对齐。实验证明，引入注视信息能显著提升报告的准确性和临床一致性，为自动化医疗诊断提供了结合专家经验的新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Existing deep learning methods for radiology report generation enhance diagnosticefficiency but often overlook physician-informed medical priors. This leads to asuboptimal alignment between the structured explanations and disease …

papers.title_en: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
papers.tldr: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）常因注意力过度集中于视觉显著或高频内容而产生幻觉。本文提出“公平注意力”（Equitable Attention）机制，旨在解码过程中平衡注意力分配，从而增强视觉定位能力并减少幻觉。该方法通过优化视觉与语言的对齐，显著提升了模型生成内容的真实性与准确性，为解决多模态幻觉问题提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that areabsent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding isdisproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We …

papers.title_en: MedLVR: Latent Visual Reasoning for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering
papers.tldr: 针对现有医疗视觉问答（VQA）模型过度依赖文本推理、将图像视为静态背景而导致可靠性不足的问题，本文提出MedLVR框架。该方法引入潜空间视觉推理机制，使模型在推理过程中能动态地与视觉特征交互，而非仅依赖初始的一次性编码。研究贡献在于通过增强视觉与文本的深度耦合，显著提升了医疗多模态模型在复杂临床场景下的推理准确性与稳健性。
papers.abstract_en: Medical vision--language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for medicalvisual question answering (VQA), yet their reasoning remains largely text-centric:images are encoded once as static context, and subsequent inference is dominated …

papers.title_en: RobustMedSAM: Degradation-Resilient Medical Image Segmentation via Robust Foundation Model Adaptation
papers.tldr: 针对基于SAM的医学图像分割模型在面对噪声、模糊和运动伪影等真实临床退化时性能下降的问题，本文提出了RobustMedSAM。该研究通过鲁棒的基础模型适配技术，增强了模型在处理各种退化医学图像时的可靠性。RobustMedSAM在保持高性能的同时，显著提升了对复杂临床环境的适应能力，为构建稳健的医学影像AI系统提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Medical image segmentation models built on Segment Anything Model (SAM)achieve strong performance on clean benchmarks, yet their reliability often degradesunder realistic image corruptions such as noise, blur, motion artifacts, and modality …

papers.title_en: SemEnrich: Self-Supervised Semantic Enrichment of Radiology Reports for Vision-Language Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学影像-文本数据集中存在的报告偏见问题（即医生倾向于记录异常而忽略正常发现，导致信息缺失），提出了SemEnrich框架。该框架通过自监督学习对放射科报告进行语义增强，补全潜在的缺失信息，从而提升了视觉-语言预训练模型在医学领域的表征能力和下游任务表现。
papers.abstract_en: Medical vision-language datasets are often limited in size and biased towardnegative findings, as clinicians report abnormalities mostly but might omit somepositive/neutral findings because they might be considered as irrelevant to the …

papers.title_en: Radiology Report Generation for Low-Quality X-Ray Images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现实临床场景中X射线图像质量参差不齐（如噪声和伪影）导致放射报告生成（RRG）性能下降的问题，提出了一种专门针对低质量图像优化的视觉语言模型框架。该研究填补了现有模型过度依赖高质量输入的空白，通过增强模型对图像退化的鲁棒性，显著提升了在复杂临床环境下的报告生成准确性与实用性。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly advanced automated RadiologyReport Generation (RRG). However, existing methods implicitly assume high-qualityinputs, overlooking the noise and artifacts prevalent in real-world clinical …

papers.title_en: Adapting 2D Multi-Modal Large Language Model for 3D CT Image Analysis
papers.tldr: 本文探讨了如何将预训练的2D多模态大语言模型（MLLM）适配于3D CT图像分析。针对3D医学影像在临床诊断中的重要性，研究者利用2D MLLM强大的感知与跨模态对齐能力，通过创新的适配机制克服了维度差异，实现了对三维医学数据的高效理解与分析，为医疗AI提供了一种新范式。
papers.abstract_en: 3D medical image analysis is of great importance in disease diagnosis andtreatment. Recently, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have exhibitedrobust perceptual capacity, strong cross-modal alignment, and promising …

papers.title_en: AC-MIL: Weakly Supervised Atrial LGE-MRI Quality Assessment via Adversarial Concept Disentanglement
papers.tldr: 针对房颤管理中LGE-MRI图像质量易受运动和呼吸干扰且缺乏精细标注的问题，本文提出AC-MIL框架。该方法结合多实例学习（MIL）与对抗性概念解耦技术，通过在弱监督条件下分离图像的质量特征与解剖特征，实现了高效、自动化的房颤MRI质量评估，显著提升了临床影像筛选的效率。
papers.abstract_en: High-quality Late Gadolinium Enhancement (LGE) MRI can be helpful for atrialfibrillation management, yet scan quality is frequently compromised by patientmotion, irregular breathing, and suboptimal image acquisition timing. While Multiple …

papers.title_en: Enhancing Fine-Grained Spatial Grounding in 3D CT Report Generation via Discriminative Guidance
papers.tldr: 本研究针对3D CT放射报告生成中细粒度空间定位不足的问题，提出了一种基于判别式引导的增强方法。该方法通过引入判别式机制，引导视觉-语言模型（VLM）更准确地捕捉影像中的空间特征，从而实现文本描述与解剖位置的精确对齐。实验证明，该方法在提升报告准确性和空间一致性方面具有显著优势，为自动化放射学工作流提供了更可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Vision--language models (VLMs) for radiology report generation (RRG) can producelong-form chest CT reports from volumetric scans and show strong potential toimprove radiology workflow efficiency and consistency. However, existing methods …

papers.title_en: Back to the Barn with LLAMAs: Evolving Pretrained LLM Backbones in Finetuning Vision Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在视觉语言模型（VLM）微调过程中，如何通过升级其核心的大语言模型（LLM）主干来提升性能。随着推理和指令遵循能力更强的预训练LLM不断涌现，本文研究了将这些新模型集成到VLM架构中的有效策略。通过实验验证了LLM主干的演进对增强多模态理解和推理能力的显著作用，为构建更强大的视觉助手提供了技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have rapidly advanced by leveraging powerful pre-trained Large Language Models (LLMs) as core reasoning backbones. As new andmore capable LLMs emerge with improved reasoning, instruction-following, and …

papers.title_en: Dialectic-Med: Mitigating Diagnostic Hallucinations via Counterfactual Adversarial Multi-Agent Debate
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大模型在医疗诊断中因确认偏差导致的视觉幻觉问题，本文提出 Dialectic-Med 框架。该框架通过引入反事实对抗性多智能体辩论机制，促使模型在辩论中审视并纠正错误的初始假设，从而显著降低诊断幻觉，提升了医疗影像分析的准确性与可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in healthcare suffer from severeconfirmation bias, often hallucinating visual details to support initial, potentiallyerroneous diagnostic hypotheses. Existing Chain-of-Thought (CoT) approaches lack …

papers.title_en: A Mechanistic Analysis of Looped Reasoning Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对通过在潜空间循环层结构来提升推理能力的“循环推理语言模型”进行了机械论分析。文章探讨了这种循环机制如何影响模型的内部表征和推理逻辑，旨在揭示其性能提升的底层原理。通过对模型内部运作的深入剖析，为理解和优化大语言模型的复杂推理过程提供了重要的理论依据和实证支持。
papers.abstract_en: Reasoning has become a central capability in large language models. Recentresearch has shown that reasoning performance can be improved by looping anLLM's layers in the latent dimension, resulting in looped reasoning language models …
